name: Calculatrice de Bardeaux
seo_title: Calculatrice Bardeaux – Bottes et Carrés de Toiture
seo_description: Calculez le nombre de bardeaux et bottes nécessaires. Entrez les dimensions du toit et la pente pour obtenir les carrés de toiture et le nombre de bottes.
description: Calculateur de Toiture. Free online calculator with formula, examples and step-by-step guide.
desc: Calculateur de Toiture. Free online calculator with formula, examples and step-by-step guide.
steps: Flat roof area: 12 m × 8 m = 96 m²
Adjust for 30° pitch: 96 m² ÷ cos(30°) = 110.9 m² effective
Add 10% waste for hips and valleys: 110.9 m² × 1.10 = 122 m²
Bundles (3 m² per bundle): 122 m² ÷ 3 = 41 bundles
mistakes: Measuring floor area instead of roof surface — pitch increases surface area
Not adding waste for valleys, hips, and ridges — 10–15% extra for complex roofs
Forgetting underlayment, ridge caps, and starter strips in the order
formula_display: Area = L × W; Effective = area ÷ cos(pitch); Bundles = effective × (1 + waste%) ÷ coverage
